query:
SELECT r.id, r.requestNumber, r.status, ai.status as instanceStatus, at2.status as taskStatus, at2.decision, at2.clarificationTarget, at2.comments
FROM requests r
LEFT JOIN approvalInstances ai ON ai.requestId = r.id
LEFT JOIN approvalTasks at2 ON at2.instanceId = ai.id
WHERE r.requestNumber = 'REQ-20260209-D2D19Q'
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT r.id, r.requestNumber, r.status, ai.status as instanceStatus, at2.status as taskStatus, at2.decision, at2.clarificationTarget, at2.comments

LEFT JOIN approvalTasks at2 ON at2.instanceId = ai.id
